title: lagerstroemia indica f. alba
intro: Lagerstroemia indica f. alba, also known as the white crape myrtle, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Lythraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, derived from its bark, leaves, and roots. The health benefits of Lagerstroemia indica f. alba include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions, such as wounds and ulcers. The plant's medicinal properties can be utilized through various herbal preparations, including decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
